profile.education: University of Louisiana at Lafayette (BS, Environmental & Sustainable Resources); Loyola University New Orleans (JD)
profile.background: Attorney and oil industry worker; U.S. Representative (2011-2013); Louisiana Attorney General (2016-2024); became 57th governor in 2024.

profile.education: Louisiana State University (BS), LSU School of Medicine (MD)
profile.background: Gastroenterologist and associate professor at LSU Health Sciences Center. Co-founded clinic for uninsured. Former Louisiana State Senator and U.S. House member.

profile.education: Vanderbilt University (BA), University of Virginia School of Law (JD), Oxford University (BCL)
profile.background: Former Louisiana State Treasurer for 17 years. Attorney and former special counsel to Governor Buddy Roemer. Studied at Oxford. Former Democrat who switched to Republican Party.
